codeReview.summary: The feature correctly moves the reviewer workbench onto the shared submit/return dialogs, keeps currentNode-driven action gating explicit, refreshes the selected task plus workflow history after mutations, and closes the previously reported return-target bug by passing the dialog-selected node through to `returnTaskToNode`.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker skipped the skill's required live-browser validation step even though the feature changes the reviewer dialog path directly, so the mission shared state still lacks manual evidence for the standard submit/return flow on `3101`.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton entry 5 in `/Users/dongpengcheng/.factory/missions/4d7bd249-b8ec-4d5d-9033-77ef2ded8396/worker-transcripts.jsonl` records `followedProcedure: false` with a deviation for step 9; the skill requires manual verification at `/Volumes/DPC/work/plant-code/plant3d-web/.worktrees/mission-review-m1-m2/.factory/skills/review-entry-worker/SKILL.md:57`, and shared user-testing guidance also expects evidence for the standard submit/return dialog path at `/Volumes/DPC/work/plant-code/plant3d-web/.worktrees/mission-review-m1-m2/.factory/library/user-testing.md:45`.

summary: Reviewed handoff `2026-03-13T14-59-48-238Z__m2-standard-workflow-actions__87cd126c-0ca3-403d-9f9a-0cc05c58a550.json`, transcript skeleton, skill guidance, and commit `eaa9f337e5da499b9acc0104c198bec783738e17`.
